name: Scandi Standard AB (publ)
summary: Scandi Standard AB (publ) develops, slaughters, produces, markets, and sells chicken products in Sweden, Denmark, Norway, Ireland, and Finland. It offers ready-to-cook, ready-to-eat, and other products under the Danpo, Den Stolte Hane, Kronf√É¬•gel, Manor Farm, and Naapurin Maalaiskana brand names. The company is also involved in rearing, producing, and hatching day-old chicks; packing and selling eggs; and the provision of feeds for the contracted farmers. It distributes its products through stores, restaurants, and other catering operations, such as schools and hospitals, as well as retail, and food service and food industry sectors. The company also exports its products to approximately 40 countries. Scandi Standard AB (publ) was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
